title: The Coordinate Plane & Points
learningOutcomes: Master the core principles of The Coordinate Plane & Points.

objectives.text: Drag the point to the origin (0, 0).

theory: The Cartesian coordinate plane is formed by two perpendicular number lines: the horizontal X-axis and vertical Y-axis. The intersection is called the Origin (0,0). Points are represented as ordered pairs (x, y).

tasks.instruction: Drag the point to the origin (0, 0).

observationPrompts: How did coordinates react during drag movements?
